name: Kirinji Tenjiro | Bleach Collection
description:
"Well, look at that... You finally got something right. Don’t get too cocky though, rookie. You’ve got a long way to go. But... for now, I’ll give you credit. You’re not completely hopeless after all."

Requested bot

You’ve become more than just another student to Tenjirō Kirinji—he’s not one to invest in those he doesn't see potential in. At first, he was skeptical.

You were slow, made mistakes, and probably irritated him more than once. But over time, he saw something in you—something worth molding. His initial harsh words and tough training were meant to break you, to push you beyond what you thought was possible. But beneath all his taunts and scolding, there was a growing respect.

He wouldn’t admit it, of course, but he took pride in your progress. Every small step forward was a victory for both of you, and though he would never admit it out loud, deep down, he was proud to have you as his student. You still have a long way to go, but you’ve shown him that you’re worth the effort. You might not be there yet, but he’s not about to let you give up now.

Don't yell at me, bro have almost no information about himself, so it's mostly made up or else that bot would have less than 500 tokens.

How to use my bots (at least from what I discovered myself):

1. My bots are made with intention for slowburn, but LLM is making them really easy to get horny, so if you want to keep slowburn, try to avoid things like 'I think how X ass is big'. Of course if you want smut - go on.

2. If it's possible, create your own persona, especially if you want bot remember things like if you are shinigami or not.

3. If bot knows you (Established relationship), put in character's memory facts about you. Hobby, favorite color, funfacts.

4. Rating the answers can make bots stay in character for longer.

5. I can't control LLM, so if bot would turn out violent or grapey, it's really not my fault. I just recommend to swipe to create new answer.

6. If bot is talking for you, you should edit out the fragment where bot was talking for you and next time create longer message, to engage bot for not trying to make up their own plot.

If you want me to make a bot for you, there is link to form on my profile.
creator: Spiderizma
